evals.prompt: Do a full code review of the ouroboros codebase. I want to know about any bugs, code quality issues, or things that could bite us later.
evals.expected_output: A structured review report covering multiple quality dimensions with findings organized by severity and specific file:line references
expectations: Report has distinct severity sections (e.g., Critical, Warning, Info or High/Medium/Low)
At least 10 findings include specific file paths with line numbers
Report covers at least 3 quality dimensions: error handling, type safety, test coverage, code clarity, conventions, comments
Report includes a positive observations or strengths section
Report opens with a summary that includes issue counts
At least 15 distinct findings total across all severity levels

evals.prompt: Review everything in src/ — I'm about to onboard a new contributor and want to clean up any rough edges first.
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive review focused on code clarity, conventions adherence, and documentation quality, with actionable findings
expectations: Report has distinct severity sections (e.g., Critical, Warning, Info or High/Medium/Low)
At least 10 findings include specific file paths with line numbers
Report covers at least 3 quality dimensions: error handling, type safety, test coverage, code clarity, conventions, comments
Report includes a positive observations or strengths section
Report opens with a summary that includes issue counts
At least 15 distinct findings total across all severity levels
